title: ctenitis sacholepis
intro: Ctenitis sacholepis, also known as the Sacholepis fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis sacholepis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal properties. Ctenitis sacholepis is often prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
